since_last: 37% of 87 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.42%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -2.56% · Gold +1.45% · Nasdaq100 +0.74%. 37% of 87 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.42%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.42%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.19%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +16.70%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +16.70%, AMAT +10.75%, TER +8.53%, QCOM +8.13%, KLAC +7.37%. Laggards: INOD -10.90%, DELL -6.05%, PLTR -5.84%, AAPL -5.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.81% at $151.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.81% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
